L1.head: design of MOF with quasi-metallic properties
L1.tail: mimicking active sites of natural enzymes
L1.claim: 准金属MOF的设计能够模拟天然酶的活性位点

L1.head: mimicking active sites of natural enzymes
L1.claim: 模拟酶活性位点增强了MOF的催化活性

L1.head: enhanced catalytic activity
L1.tail: conversion of endogenous tumor microenvironment components into cytotoxic species
L1.claim: 增强的催化活性导致内源性肿瘤微环境成分转化为细胞毒性物质

L2.head: incorporating transition metals with redox-active centers into the MOF structure
L2.tail: efficient generation of reactive oxygen species (ROS) from molecular oxygen and hydrogen peroxide
L2.claim: 将氧化还原活性过渡金属引入MOF结构使其能够从分子氧和过氧化氢中高效生成活性氧

L3.head: optimization for stability and biocompatibility
L3.tail: selective induction of oxidative stress in cancer cells
L3.claim: 优化稳定性和生物相容性使MOF能够选择性诱导癌细胞的氧化应激

L3.head: selective induction of oxidative stress
L3.tail: apoptosis and tumor regression without significant toxicity
L3.claim: 选择性氧化应激的诱导导致癌细胞凋亡和肿瘤消退，且无显著毒性
